BVR-X65

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 6E
Func Name: BVA

    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "21C1",
    "name": "APV 01 et Ctrl fin chaine 01",

        "firstbyte": 6,

      },

        "ref": true

    }
  },

      },

        "firstbyte": 27,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },

    "minbytes": 23,

      },

        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 15,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },

      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true

  {
    "minbytes": 24,
    "sentbytes": "230000000000",
    "name": "Lecture Mémoire",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Adresse": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Nombre d octet à lire": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "  Octet 1": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "  Octet 10": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "  Octet 11": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "  Octet 12": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "  Octet 13": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "  Octet 14": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "  Octet 15": {
        "firstbyte": 16,
        "ref": true
      },
      "  Octet 16": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "  Octet 17": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true
      },
      "  Octet 18": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },
      "  Octet 19": {
        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true
      },
      "  Octet 2": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "  Octet 20": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
